hits.label: A5 dot
hits.summary: AAtA dot optical project with PL dispersion and peak-tracking analyses.

hits.label: optical probes can be primary evidence for correlated states
hits.summary: For Xu Lab-style moiré work, PL, RMCD, MOKE, and pump-probe measurements should be treated as potentially state-sensitive primary evidence, not merely support for transport.

hits.label: semiconductor moire materials should be viewed as a unified field spanning excitons, Hubbard-model physics, magnetism, topology, and designer many-body states
hits.summary: semiconductor moire materials should be viewed as a unified field spanning excitons, Hubbard-model physics, magnetism, topology, and designer many-body states Use for: the best compact field review when orienting someone new to modern TMD moire physics

hits.label: The nu=-1/3 PL spectrum disperses with out-of-plane magnetic field, supporting a nontrivial topological interpretation.

provenance.method: Codex curation pass from arXiv abstract

hits.summary: The optical -1/3 FQAH report states that PL spectra at nu=-1/3 disperse with increasing out-of-plane magnetic field and that exact-diagonalization calculations support a topologically nontrivial interpretation.

hits.label: interlayer excitons can be trapped by the moiré potential and inherit strong valley-selective optical signatures
hits.summary: interlayer excitons can be trapped by the moiré potential and inherit strong valley-selective optical signatures Use for: the basic idea that moiré structure can discretize and localize optical excitations

hits.label: moire potentials should be viewed as a programmable excitonic lattice, not only as a perturbation to a uniform exciton
hits.summary: moire potentials should be viewed as a programmable excitonic lattice, not only as a perturbation to a uniform exciton Use for: conceptual bridge from early interlayer-exciton work to modern moire-exciton and correlated-optics interpretation

hits.label: C5 deck treats bilayer trion fractional features and hBN-hole dot staircases as actionable optical signals.

provenance.method: Codex curation pass over extracted deck text

hits.summary: The C5 deck reports clear bilayer trion emission with visible fractional features, many fractions below -1/2, dot-like spectra in hBN holes, a staircase at B=1.2 T, and dispersion that needs better data near 3.1 degrees.

hits.label: Again, similar D-field spectrum for the trions, however there are some interesting things going on in the exciton spectrum.
hits.summary: Deck-derived claim from CWB D2 ScanningPL, slide 14: Again, similar D-field spectrum for the trions, however there are some interesting things going on in the exciton spectrum.

hits.label: At positive doping, you can very clearly see a hybridized layer region for the exciton.
hits.summary: Deck-derived claim from CWB D2 ScanningPL, slide 17: At positive doping, you can very clearly see a hybridized layer region for the exciton.

hits.label: optical pumping is now being used as an active control knob for integer and fractional Chern states, not just as a passive probe
hits.summary: optical pumping is now being used as an active control knob for integer and fractional Chern states, not just as a passive probe Use for: the next-step logic where PL helicity and optical drive can manipulate correlated topology directly
